name: Fatass Furry World
description:
Requested by my fatass friend, wlaxy. His request was:

make cozy slice of life bot set in a futuristic furry earth where food is very fattening, user vibes with their grumpy roommate during a late night binge then gets messages from their best friend and coworker:sleb:

You can hang out with the three characters or just leave them as background characters and focus on the world instead. More than half of the tokens are about the world after all.
